  • In Praise of Mediocrity - The New York Times →

    Tim Wu on having hobbies:

    Lost here is the gentle pursuit of a modest competence, the doing of something just because you enjoy it, not because you are good at it.

    → 9:42 PM, Oct 4

  • A few weeks ago I asked if anyone ever deleted their entire Apple Music collection and started over. Well, I just did. Re-booting and adding back with purpose and mindful of the all-you-can-eat world we live in now. Before: 44,000+ songs. Current: 1,486 and a focus on quality.

    → 9:36 AM, Oct 4

  • Don’t Miss This: “Redlands” by Jordie Bellaire and Vanesa Del Rey – Multiversity Comics →

    So good!

    → 3:37 PM, Oct 3

  • I Know Brett Kavanaugh, but I Wouldn’t Confirm Him - The Atlantic →

    → 8:46 PM, Oct 2

  • If the Point of Capitalism is to Escape Capitalism, Then What’s the Point of Capitalism? →

    The capitalist, ironically enough, is trying to earn his freedom from capitalism — just like everyone else. The only difference is that he’s a step closer

    → 8:26 PM, Oct 2

  • Exciting start to the hockey season! Zoey’s team got off to a 2-0 lead and the other team battled back to tie it up and then take the lead with a couple minutes left. Zoey’s team battled hard and scored the tying goal with 48 seconds left. A super fun game to watch.

    → 9:20 PM, Sep 28

  • J. Cole was so good. Put on an awesome show!

    → 11:19 PM, Sep 25

    Seeing J. Cole tonight! So excited.

    → 10:05 AM, Sep 25

  • Lol. What 17 year old has an underage drinking party on their calendar, much less one from 36 years ago.

    → 4:46 PM, Sep 23

    → 9:51 AM, Sep 21

  • Has anyone ever done a hard reset of Apple Music? (Delete all and start over?) Between iCloud Music Library files not matching current Apple Music entries (so sometimes I add an album twice) and my old way of collecting everything because I could, my library is overwhelming.

    → 8:54 AM, Sep 21

  • Brie Larson Was Told to Smile in ‘Captain Marvel,’ So She Put Smiles onto Marvel Dudes →

    Perfect response.

    → 9:17 PM, Sep 20

  • The Siri Shortcuts implementation has me looking at Things again… Shortcuts could be used to make custom Perspectives, which was a big draw for OmniFocus 3. Not as robust, but I don’t get too crazy with criteria.

    → 1:39 PM, Sep 20

  • Here’s a simple Siri Shortcut to subscribe to the current site in Feedbin
